claim_boundary.next_gate: Produce the C7 machine-check replay bundle before any B7 ledger retest.
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: R64 does not complete C7 machine-check replay, close O3, allow reroute, or grant B7/STV/resource-ledger promotion.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: R64 emits hash-bound C6 leakage-free optimizer traces for all 8 accepted R63 denominator rows and verifies command arguments, used-input limits, forbidden-input review, transcript hashes, stdout hashes, and acceptance transcripts.
